pr.title: The Frugendorff: Recursive Weight Sharing for Transformer Compression (1.1478 BPB, 15.19MB)

output.summary: Recursive weight sharing reuses 6 distinct transformer blocks twice, freeing budget for 4× wider MLPs and loop-conditioned embeddings inside a 16 MB artifact.
techniques: recursive weight sharing with loop-position embeddings
MLP 4× expansion funded by shared parameters
stabilization stack via Muon/AdamW split with EMA
